notes: Adds honest incident email notification delivery feedback after create, update, comment, approve, reject, and reopen actions.
Shows SMTP delivery failures directly on the incident page so admins can distinguish saved workflow actions from email configuration problems.
Adds a visible Save incident updates button next to the incident Status field so status changes are easier to complete.
Makes incident approver comments mandatory for both approval and rejection.
Adds a dedicated incident Review discussion section for reviewer reasons, assignee responses, and resubmission evidence.
Renames the incident approval handoff to IN_REVIEW while preserving RESOLVE_REQUESTED as a compatibility alias.
Adds editable incident priority, automatic detail refresh after actions, and closes people-picker suggestions after selection.
When a rejected incident receives a review response, OrbitSM automatically sends it back to IN_REVIEW.
Keeps the general OrbitSM SKU image family unchanged.
Standardizes Incident, Problem, and Change display numbers across registers, detail pages, relationship maps, and linked-work panels while retaining internal IDs only as small support references.
